overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a red plaid jacket and winter gear walking along a snowy mountain road through a ski resort area. The character moves past wooden lodge buildings and pine trees with snow falling gently in a video game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain road with pine forest

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the asphalt road surrounded by snow banks and pine trees

entered.detail: paved single-lane mountain road with yellow dividing lines
snow banks lining both sides of the road
tall evergreen trees densely packed along the roadside
snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background
brown wooden ski lodge building visible ahead on the left

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved mountain road surrounded by snow-covered ground and dense pine trees. A wooden lodge building is visible in the distance on the left, with snow-capped mountains rising in the background under an overcast sky with falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered roadside beside ski resort buildings

events.description: character steps off the asphalt road onto the snow-covered shoulder

agents.ego_description: walking along the snow bank beside the road, passing wooden lodge buildings

entered.detail: low blue and red industrial structure with metal siding
tall modern street lamp along the roadside
structure with distinctive red, yellow and blue Red Bull branding on roof

segments.scene_description: Moving onto the snow-covered shoulder, the character walks alongside the road past a large wooden lodge and a blue industrial building with colorful Red Bull branding. Street lights line the path as the character progresses through the ski resort area with snow falling steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved road through ski resort village

events.description: character steps back onto the asphalt road from the snow shoulder

agents.ego_description: walking on the paved road past the lodge buildings and street furniture

entered.detail: blue directional road sign with white symbols
large blue information display board on the roadside

segments.scene_description: Back on the paved road, the character continues past the wooden lodge buildings and street infrastructure. The road curves gently as the character moves through the built-up resort area with snow banks on the sides and information boards visible.

events.description: passing blue directional flags and entering a more open mountain road section

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding road away from the buildings toward the distant mountains

entered.detail: tall blue directional flags lining the left side of the road
snow-covered mountain peaks becoming visible again in the distance

segments.scene_description: The road opens up as the character passes blue directional flags and signage, leaving the dense building area behind. The path continues toward distant snow-covered mountains with pine trees lining both sides of the road under the overcast winter sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain road that transitions from a dense forest setting into a developed ski resort and finally back into an open wilderness. It begins with the character walking along a paved road flanked by thick pine trees and distant snow-capped peaks under a steady snowfall. As the path shifts toward the snow-covered shoulder, the camera passes a large wooden lodge and a blue industrial building featuring colorful Red Bull branding and lining street lights. The scene then curves back onto the pavement, moving through the built-up resort area past information boards and snow banks before the road opens up. Finally, the camera leaves the buildings behind, passing blue directional flags as the path stretches toward the distant mountains and pine-lined horizons under an overcast winter sky.
